bytecodeCheck.note: NOT an invalid predicted address — contract deployed successfully on-chain

rootCause.onChain: Deployment did NOT revert — receipt status 0x1, bytecode present, OwnershipTransferred emitted
rootCause.uiFalseNegative: Post-deploy verifyWrapperImmutables used MetaMask Web3Provider; failure in catch block set receiptStatus=failed for entire flow even after successful CREATE
rootCause.gasRisk: MetaMask gas limit 1,155,653 vs 1,147,685 used (only 7,968 headroom) — succeeded but dangerously tight

fixApplied.receiptPolling: eth_getTransactionReceipt via wallet with explicit success + bytecode check
fixApplied.immutableReads: JsonRpcProvider (direct RPC) instead of MetaMask for verification
fixApplied.uiGating: wrapper address shown only when receiptStatus=success AND bytecode confirmed
fixApplied.failureDisplay: Deployment reverted + exact failureReason when receipt fails
fixApplied.retry: Deploy Wrapper re-enabled after failed status

founderNote: Existing tx 0x71e8... may already be a valid wrapper at 0xe29b... — hard refresh page; no redeploy required unless founder wants a fresh address
